creator: tmclaugh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->open

Received feedback in private email: 

I'm not familiar with mechanize, so I should not volunteer to be 
maintainer of that, but I agree that it's fine to deprecate 
py-clientcookie. It's part of Python 2.4 anyway, so demand should be 
quite low. 

-- Richard 

Both devel/py-clientcookie and www/py-htmltestcase have been marked as 
DEPRECATED and have an EXPIRATION date set.  py-htmltestcase could be ported 
to use www/py-mechanize probably fairly easilly if someone is interested in 
saving it.
